description: The Licentiate in Music (L.Mus.) Major Performance Voice is a 105-credit program. Special Requirements Continuation in the program requires a minimum grade of A- in practical instruction/exams, ensembles, and voice coaching. Candidates must take the L.Mus. Performance 1 Examination at the end of their first year of study and the L.Mus. Performance 2 and 3 Examinations in each of the next two years if they hope to complete the program in the normal length of time.
